# Copilot Instructions

## Language Rule

**All project files must be written entirely in English.**

This applies to all code, comments, documentation, commit messages, issue templates, configuration files, and any other text content in the repository.

Even if the user communicates with Copilot in French (or any other language) in the chat window, all generated code, file contents, and documentation must remain in English. This is a public GitHub project and English is the standard language for the entire codebase.
